defaultName: ルシッドドリーミング
name: Lucid Dreaming

names.value: ルシッドドリーミング

pvs.author: Alexandra Ionescu (naruto44355)
pvs.description:
FYI: A lucid dream is a dream in which one is aware that one is dreaming. 
In a lucid dream, the dreamer can actively participate in and manipulate imaginary experiences in the dream environment. Lucid dreams can seem real and vivid. (Source: wikipedia.com)

[Author]: くぇ（ナイーヴP）/ kue (naīvu P)
[English & Romaji]: naruto44355
[NND]: http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm15912885
[Mp3]: http://nicosound.anyap.info/sound/sm15912885
[Off vocal/ Instrumental]: http://piapro.jp/t/mxYn

Romaji:

daitai itsu demo maigo de 
shikō ga burete jikan goto 
hane tobasu 

SUKECHI korogaru IMEEJI 
dōse hora sugu tebanasushi 
sute toite 

aimai sonzai 
guru guru madoi hiyori 
migite ni amai SHIGARETTO 
warai ai boku ni tsukisasu 

kokyū kon-nan mitai tōsaku wa imasarada 
wasuretai kao ga ume tsukushite 

iroaseta bibitto kimi no koto nuritsubusu 
mō dame da, yameta! 
iiya nigete shimaou 

sorede yarinaoshi 
chōkeshi no kinō ga JIRIRI ayumiyoru
... wasureyou 

SUICHI hono ka na DAMEEJI 
sōse hora mata dame nanda 
sute toite 

sōtai kōkai 
RUUPU de kioku wa kanata 
hidarite ni nigai KYANDI 
yume wo mitai nara doku o ageru 

tobidashite shunkan ochi kata wo kangaete 
Mō iiya bakari tsuzuku musekinin-gimi 

meisō wa tsuzuku hyōshiki wa azawarau 
kimi no toko iku to shitara 
modosenaku naru 

`――-sōda, mōsō kairo de odorou ka. 
sorenara boku mo boku ni yasashiishi. 
kowa kizuite, nigedashi chau no nara, 
hajimenaide, hōridashite, JIENDO.' 

omou dake mirai ibitsu na katachi 
yarinaoshi sore de nigete 
dakedo hoshikute 

gucha-gucha na omoi katazuke mo sunde nai 
kitanakute na noni kimi ni ai ni ikanakya 

hensoku sekai susumu tabi fuantei 
'nigeyou ka?' 
yogiru mae ni boku wo hanashita 

SUICHI nagesutete 
chirakatta boku no heya 
tsumutte teta me o aketara
boku janai kimi no hata
pvs.name: 【初音ミク】 Lucid Dreaming - English & Romaji
